summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PRA-GATI quant trading dashboard. All backend APIs and frontend features working correctly with sample data fallback.

design_issues.issue: Scanner button shows 'SCANNING...' when in loading state, could be clearer

passed_tests: All 17 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Signals endpoint returns proper signal objects with required fields
Ranked signals endpoint includes score field
Scanner endpoint returns proper scan results
Debug endpoints for RELIANCE symbol work correctly
Frontend application loads with QUANTTERM branding
Dashboard page shows correct stats and navigation
All page navigation works (Dashboard, Live Signals, Ranked, Scanner, Universe, Debug)
Universe page displays 206 symbols as expected
Debug page analysis works with RELIANCE symbol
RUN_ENGINE functionality shows proper execution state
Scanner functionality displays results (ANGELONE with score 23.0)
No critical error messages found on any page
